coverage: Limited Lifetime on motor, 3 years on housing.
exclusions: Battery wear and tear, water submersion, or professional rental use.
claims_process: Contact support@terramax.com with proof of purchase.

coverage: Full replacement for LED failure or sensor malfunction.
exclusions: Damage caused by improper electrical installation or lightning strikes.
claims_process: Return to authorized dealer or use the LuminaSmart App portal.

coverage: Internal hardware failure and battery degradation over 30%.
exclusions: Physical damage to ear cushions or cracked headbands.

coverage: Heating element and fan motor replacement.
exclusions: Cosmetic scratches to non-stick coating or dishwasher damage.
claims_process: Requires original box for return shipping to service center.

exclusions: Replacement filters (consumables) and damage from freezing pipes.
claims_process: Registration required within 30 days of installation to activate 5-year term.
